content: Phase 4: Document vpin_window_buckets=5 rationale in BLOCKERS §21 (per owner note b)
Phase 4: Build src/sfpe/projection/engine_state.py — per-source-bar in-progress engine state trace (one func per engine)
Phase 4: Build src/sfpe/projection/per_engine.py — per-engine projection math (§7.3)
Phase 4: Build src/sfpe/projection/ensemble.py — ensemble alignment (§7.4), bias override (§7.5), geometric-mean confidence (§7.6 + BLOCKERS §29)
Phase 4: Build scripts/run_projection.py CLI; produces ensemble + per-engine CSVs
Phase 4: Build scripts/run_projection_acceptance.py for §11.2 gates + calibration plots
Phase 4: Write tests/test_projection.py (schema + sanity) and tests/test_no_lookahead_projection.py (4 engine-state traces)
Phase 4: Compute joint trade-eligibility pass-rate across all 9 instruments
Phase 4: §11.2 acceptance — 5/9 instruments PASS (meets owner threshold)
